name: reflect
description: Reflect on your own working session — the one reflexive, cross-cutting family (the work process itself, not the code/decisions/docs/reasoning the other plugins operate on); it sits across the object-families, not parallel to them. Four skills, two read/write pairs: catchup/park work the cursor (catchup orients — where the work stands now + next, rebuilt from git/diff/plan, not chat memory, checking a parked HANDOFF.md first; park writes that same five-shape cursor + the current git SHA into HANDOFF.md before stepping away), summarize/observe work the knowledge (summarize recaps — a complete, objective account of what the session did, the raw input observe distills; observe distills the one durable, reusable learning into a knowledge base). Read-only except park's and observe's single writes. Cross-project, language-agnostic.
